prompt: You are scoring how well a single image matches a blog post topic.
The post is about the following themes: {IMAGE_THEMES}
Look at the attached image and judge how relevant it is to those themes for use as an illustration in the post.
Respond with ONLY a single number between 0 and 1 (e.g. 0.0, 0.35, 0.9). Do not add any words, punctuation, or explanation.
0 = not relevant at all, 1 = perfectly relevant.
